entries.description: loadActiveColonyState automatically calls repairMissingPlanFromArtifacts before aether plan decides whether to generate or reuse a plan. When COLONY_STATE.json has a goal but empty Plan.Phases, any accepted .aether/data/planning/phase-plan.json can repopulate state and make plan return existing_plan instead of generating a fresh plan.
entries.suggestion: Add a focused regression where a fresh goal with empty Plan.Phases and a stale planning/phase-plan.json runs aether plan and proves no old phase is recovered. Gate repairMissingPlanFromArtifacts by current-goal provenance, explicit recovery context, or stricter artifact freshness tied to the active session.

entries.description: PendingDecision has no goal or session identity, and loadPendingDecisionFile returns every pending-decisions.json entry. runDiscuss, runCodexPlan, materializeOrchestratorBoundaryQuestions, countPendingClarifications, and clarifiedIntentPromptRenderResult therefore treat prior-goal unresolved and resolved clarifications as current-goal state.
entries.suggestion: Add regression tests seeding old-goal unresolved and resolved clarification decisions, then assert discuss/plan counts and colony-prime clarified intent only include current-goal entries. Add current goal/session metadata or quarantine filtering around pending-decision reads while preserving same-goal idempotency.

entries.description: advanceExternalContinue unconditionally marks ALL tasks as TaskCompleted (lines 1012-1013) when advancing a phase, regardless of individual task dispatch outcomes. This creates state corruption where tasks that were never dispatched or failed are recorded as completed in COLONY_STATE.json.
entries.suggestion: Before lines 1012-1013, validate that all tasks in the phase have completed/verified/reconciled status from the assessment. If any task has outcome missing, needs_redispatch, implemented_unverified, or simulated, block advancement rather than bulk-completing.

entries.description: applyCodexBuildState marks prior phases as PhaseCompleted (line 634) when building a later phase, without checking whether their tasks are all completed. This silently overwrites the phase status even if tasks remain pending/in_progress.
entries.suggestion: Before marking a prior phase as completed at line 634, call phaseTasksAllCompleted(). If it returns false, either block with an error or call reconcilePriorCompletedPhaseTasksFromTrustedManifests first (which already exists for build-finalize at line 181). The reconciliation in build-finalize is a mitigation but applyCodexBuildState runs in the build command path too, not just finalize.

entries.description: validateCodexBuildState only checks phase.Status == PhaseCompleted for prior phases (line 540), not whether tasks within those phases are all completed. A phase marked completed with incomplete tasks passes validation, allowing the next build to proceed on a broken foundation.
entries.suggestion: Extend the validation loop at lines 539-543 to also check phaseTasksAllCompleted(state.Plan.Phases[i]) for each prior completed phase. If tasks are incomplete, return an error pointing to the specific phase and task IDs, with recovery guidance.

entries.description: reconcilePriorCompletedPhaseTasksFromTrustedManifests only repairs tasks when a trusted build manifest exists on disk. If the manifest was deleted or never persisted (e.g., process crash mid-build), the function returns an error that blocks the build entirely, with no path to recover short of --force.
entries.suggestion: When trusted manifest is unavailable, provide a recovery command in the error message (already partially done via completedPhaseTaskRepairError) but also consider an explicit --force-repair flag that allows building despite the gap.

entries.description: reconcileCompletedBuildTasks has no direct unit test coverage. Same for phaseTasksAllCompleted, applyPriorCompletedPhaseTaskRepairs, and trustedCompletedPhaseTaskEvidence.
entries.suggestion: Add unit tests for these functions covering: happy path, empty tasks, tasks with mixed statuses, missing manifest, simulated manifest, and manifest with fewer tasks than the phase.

entries.description: mergeExternalBuildResults rejects missing worker results with hard error but has no unit tests for malformed JSON wrong identity or duplicate worker edge cases
entries.suggestion: Add failing tests for missing name duplicate name wrong caste stage task_id wave identity non-terminal status and missing required manifest

entries.description: mergeExternalPlanResults has extra did-not-complete-cleanly check at line 312 that other finalizers lack but has zero unit tests for any merge validation edge case
entries.suggestion: Add failing tests for plan finalize missing name duplicate name wrong identity non-terminal status did-not-complete-cleanly status

entries.description: mergeExternalSealReviewResults delegates to mergeExternalContinueResults via type conversion so any validation gaps in continue propagate to seal and no seal-specific validation tests exist
entries.suggestion: Add seal-specific tests confirming merge errors surface correctly through the delegation layer

entries.description: validateExternalResultIdentity lives in build finalize only while plan has validateExternalPlanIdentity and continue has validateExternalContinueIdentity - all three structurally identical but duplicated with different names
entries.suggestion: Extract shared validateWorkerResultIdentity into cmd/result_validation.go per architect design

entries.description: Error message format varies across finalizers - build says external worker result, plan says external planning result, continue says external continue result - inconsistent naming makes debugging harder
entries.suggestion: Standardize error message format to include manifest type context consistently across all four finalizer paths

entries.description: Continue watcher timeout advisory logic at attachExternalContinueWatcher lines 772-778 must be preserved - when watcher times out but runtime verification passes independently it is treated as advisory not hard block - tested in codex_continue_test.go but no corresponding test in seal
entries.suggestion: Ensure seal final review tests confirm advisory watcher timeout behavior is preserved through the mergeExternalContinueResults delegation

entries.description: materializeOrchestratorBoundaryClarifications creates PendingDecision entries without calling stampPendingDecisionScope
entries.suggestion: Add stampPendingDecisionScope after creating the decision

entries.description: materializeDiscussQuestions never surfaces orchestrator boundary questions because those use orchestrator: source prefix not in the discuss: source index
entries.suggestion: Query unresolved orchestrator boundary decisions and merge into question list

entries.description: Planning gatekeeper worker brief does not include review-ledger-write instruction unlike the continue gatekeeper
validateExternalPlanState rejects plan-finalize when phases exist unless Refresh is true but stale phases from prior colony are not cleaned on fresh init
entries.suggestion: Allow overwrite when manifest confirms no existing plan was present at plan-only time

entries.description: resolvedClarifiedIntentEntries includes stale orchestrator decisions that lack scope stamps because pendingDecisionMatchesScope returns true via the fallback path
entries.suggestion: Add source prefix check to exclude orchestrator decisions or stamp scope at creation
